name: git log
description: Show the commit history log with various formatting and filtering options

options.label: One line
options.description: Show each commit as a single line with abbreviated hash and subject

options.label: Graph
options.description: Draw a text-based graphical representation of the branch structure

options.label: All branches
options.description: Show commits from all branches, not just the current one

options.label: Number of commits
options.description: Limit the number of commits to display

validation.message: Number of commits must be at least 1

options.label: Author
options.description: Only show commits by authors matching the specified pattern

options.label: Since
options.description: Show commits after a specific date (e.g., '2 weeks ago', '2024-01-01')

options.label: Until
options.description: Show commits before a specific date (e.g., 'yesterday', '2024-12-31')

options.label: Format
options.description: Pretty-print the commit log in a specific format

choices.label: One line
choices.description: Abbreviated hash and subject on a single line

choices.label: Medium
choices.description: Hash, author, date, and full commit message

choices.label: Full
choices.description: Hash, author, committer, and full commit message

choices.label: Fuller
choices.description: Hash, author, author date, committer, commit date, and message

examples.label: Show branch graph with one-line commits
Show last 10 commits by a specific author
Show commits from the last two weeks
Pretty graph view of all branches
Commits by a specific author this month
One-line compact view of last 20 commits
